content:
Session 1 recommendation: github-copilot / openai / gpt-5.4 / high
Rationale: The task requires a large-scale, atomic refactoring across a wide variety of file types, from core TypeScript logic to Playwright tests and documentation. The specified model possesses the highest capability for precise, broad-scope code generation and transformation, ensuring consistency across the entire change set.
Estimated routed cost: high
Session 2 recommendation: claude / anthropic / Opus-class / medium
Rationale: This session implements new, cross-cutting logic for diagnostics and guardrails which is well-suited to this model's reasoning capabilities across system components.
Delegation split: The large-scale Session 1 refactor will be a routed job, while the new feature implementation in Session 2 will be direct work.
